title: Essential Woodworking Hand Tools
description: A guide to choosing, sharpening, and using the core hand tools for woodworking, from planes and chisels to saws.

title: Woodworking Basics: Mastering the Essentials of Craftsmanship
description: An integrated approach to learning woodworking through hand and machine skills, building projects that teach fundamentals.

title: A Cabinetmaker's Notebook
description: Reflections on the craft of the cabinetmaker and the making of fine furniture by hand.

title: The Anarchist's Tool Chest
description: An argument for a small, well-chosen set of hand tools and a chest to hold them, with guidance on selecting each tool.

title: With the Grain: A Craftsman's Guide to Understanding Wood
description: How wood grows, moves, and behaves, and what that means for building furniture that lasts.

title: Tage Frid Teaches Woodworking: Joinery
description: A working cabinetmaker's course in joinery, from mortise and tenon to dovetails.

title: The Workbench Design Book
description: A survey of workbench designs and the vises, tops, and joinery that make a bench work.

title: The Impractical Cabinetmaker
description: More on the studio furniture maker's craft, with projects and thoughts on working wood by hand.

title: The Essential Woodworker
description: A clear course in working wood with hand tools, from planing and sawing to building a cabinet.

title: The Handplane Book
description: A survey of handplanes, how they work, and how to tune and use them for fine surfaces.

title: The Technique of Furniture Making
description: A comprehensive reference on furniture construction, joints, and materials.

title: Understanding Wood: A Craftsman's Guide to Wood Technology
description: The science of wood structure, moisture, and movement explained for the working woodworker.

title: The Soul of a Tree: A Woodworker's Reflections
description: A woodworker's meditation on trees, timber, and building furniture that honors the wood.

title: Sam Maloof, Woodworker
description: The life and work of a self-taught furniture maker known for sculpted seating.

title: The Complete Illustrated Guide to Furniture and Cabinet Construction
description: A step-by-step visual reference to the joints and methods used to build casework and furniture.

title: The Complete Illustrated Guide to Joinery
description: An illustrated tour of woodworking joints and how to cut them by hand and machine.

title: The Why and How of Woodworking
description: A furniture maker's approach to building good work with a small set of skills and tools.

title: English Arts and Crafts Furniture
description: History and technique for building furniture in the English Arts and Crafts tradition.

title: Hand Tools: Their Ways and Workings
description: An illustrated look at traditional hand tools and how they are made and used.

title: The New Traditional Woodworker
description: Building shop appliances and furniture with hand tools using traditional layout and joinery.
